title: houpoea officinalis
intro: Houpoea officinalis, also known as the common licorice or European licorice, is a leguminous vine plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The roots and rhizomes of the plant have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Houpoea officinalis include relief from coughs, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its potential in reducing stress and anxiety levels. Herbal preparations of the plant include extracts, infusions, and dried roots, which can be used in teas, capsules, or topical applications.
